response.justification: The candidate is disqualified by the explicit requirement for native-level Japanese language proficiency, which is entirely absent from the resume. While demonstrating 12+ years of strong software engineering experience and some C/C++ background, recent work focuses on web/backend systems (TypeScript, Node.js) rather than embedded networking and security. The specialized domain expertise in embedded firmware, network security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X), and kernel-level development is not evident.
strengths: Senior-level engineer with 12+ years diverse software development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong software engineering fundamentals including TDD, testing frameworks, and Linux proficiency across multiple roles
Demonstrated ability to learn new technologies and work across embedded systems, as evidenced by robotic arm and hardware control experience
concerns: No evidence of native or fluent Japanese language proficiency, which is an explicit hard requirement
Primary recent experience in web/backend development (TypeScript, Node.js) rather than embedded firmware and network security
No demonstrable expertise in embedded network security technologies, LAN-switch products, or kernel-level Linux modification

key_factors.factor: C focus outdated; recent work in different stack
